info.title: Secure Incident API
info.description: Core API for Secure Incident. A user can belong to many projects, but only within one organization or in private projects.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Project creation, listing, membership, and details.

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Project-scoped categories used to classify incidents.

tags.name: Incidents
tags.description: Incident reporting, workflow, comments, and visible logs.

tags.name: Profiles
tags.description: User profile and optional presentation data.

tags.name: Invitations
tags.description: Extended invite handling for organizations and projects.

post.description: Creates a new user account. After registration the user may create one organization, join one existing organization, or continue with private projects only.

post.summary: Log in user and return JWT token

post.description: Adds the token's JTI to the revocation list.
Always returns 204, even if the account does not exist.
Creates an organization and assigns the current user as owner. Fails if user already belongs to an organization.

409.description: User already belongs to an organization

404.description: User does not belong to any organization

post.description: Generates an invite token for joining the current organization. Organization owner only.

409.description: User already belongs to an organization

post.description: scope=ORGANIZATION requires the user to be an org member. scope=PRIVATE requires the user to have no org.

get.summary: List projects visible to current user

post.description: Generates an invite token for joining a specific project. Owner only.

get.description: No auth required. Lets frontend validate the invite link before the user logs in.

delete.description: Creator, project owner, or org owner only.

403.description: Not authorized to revoke this invite

get.summary: List incidents reported by current user
List incidents assigned to current user
